title: cannabis sativa var. indica
intro: Cannabis sativa var. indica is a subspecies of the cannabis plant, known for its higher CBD content and lower THC levels compared to other varieties. The medicinal properties of Cannabis sativa var. indica include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and relieve stress, making it a popular treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits associated with this plant include improved sleep quality, reduced anxiety and depression, and increased appetite in individuals with eating disorders. Herbal preparations of Cannabis sativa var. indica include edibles, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of medical conditions, from chronic pain to skin irritations.
